## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming product features.](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is on trend, with text-offline and open enrollment topics performing well](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Plans to build a buffer of content due to Jessica's upcoming month-long absence in December](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Upcoming launch of "frontline intelligence" feature, prompting new content cluster development](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Discussion on improving content structure for better readability and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Google Algorithm Changes

  - [Recent drop in impressions likely due to Google algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Clicks have increased despite impression drop](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Keywords ranking on first three pages have improved, some nearly tripling](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Buffer and Planning

  - [Building content buffer for Jessica's absence in December](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Next week's articles already prepared for review](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Adjusting content mix to include templates and enrichments](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

### Content Structure Improvements

  - [Suggestion to make intros shorter (3-4 sentences) and more direct](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Use more bullet points for easier scanning](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Consider adding H3 headers for better SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)

### Upcoming "Frontline Intelligence" Feature

  - [Major launch expected by end of year or early next year](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Will encourage users to upload documentation for AI analysis](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [Aims to provide insights on attendance, employee feedback, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [Targeting enterprises with 5000+ employees](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2373.0)

### Content Strategy for New Feature

  - [Start building authority around frontline intelligence topics without mentioning specific features](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2533.0)
  - [Begin creating content in November to prime audience](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2718.0)
  - [New content cluster to be developed based on frontline intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)

### Yourco's Market Position

  - [Text-based communication as a strength for reaching blue-collar industries](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)
  - [HR identified as easier persona to sell to compared to operations](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2537.0)
  - [Positive feedback from HR Tech event on frontline worker solutions](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carrie to stage this week's content for Jessica's review](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)
  - [Carrie to adjust Looker dashboard for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2721.0)
  - [Investigate and prepare content ideas around frontline intelligence for upcoming months](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2707.0)
  - [Consider testing H3 headers in blog posts for SEO improvement](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2095.0)
  - [Jessica to provide more details on frontline intelligence features in two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/qwfHLd2YrL_L4xqapM-_izJxnSw7Hk6h?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
